# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-JOB-001](task-0057): Job Records and Store

## Purpose

Create job records and store.

## Scope

- Record format
- Store implementation
- CRUD operations

## Implementation

1. Define record format
2. Implement store
3. Add CRUD

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Record format defined
2. Store works
3. CRUD functional
